---
title: "QRCODE"
author: "Daniel Myung"
date: "2026-04-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Install the package if you haven't yet: install.packages("qrcode")
library(qrcode)

# 1. Paste your live Shiny URL here
app_url <- "https://j33c4y-daniel-myung.shinyapps.io/Interactive/"

# 2. Generate the QR object
# Use a high error correction level ('H') so it scans easily even on a screen
my_qr <- qr_code(app_url, ecl = "H")

# 3. Display the code
# This will render directly in your knitted HTML document
plot(my_qr)
```
